header.title: Image Format Converter — Convert JPG, PNG, WebP & More
header.description: Free online image format converter to convert between JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF, and other image formats. Change file type without losing quality. Batch convert and resize — 100% client-side, your files stay private.
header.keywords: image format converter, convert image format, jpg to png, png to webp, image type converter, change image format, photo format converter, batch image converter

dropzone.formatsSupported: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP · Multiple files supported

privacy.note: All conversions happen locally in your browser. Your images are never uploaded to any server.

howToUse.title: How to Use Format Converter
howToUse.step1Desc: Drag and drop one or more images onto the upload area.
howToUse.step2Desc: Select the target format from the dropdown menu.
howToUse.step3Desc: Optionally set quality, max width, and max height for the output.
howToUse.step4Desc: Click Convert All to process all images, then download individually or as a zip.

items.question: What image formats are supported?
items.answer: We support JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, and TIFF for conversion.

items.question: Can I convert multiple images at once?
items.answer: Yes. You can upload and batch convert multiple images simultaneously.

items.question: Does the conversion reduce quality?
items.answer: You can control the quality setting. Lossless formats like PNG preserve full quality.

items.question: Can I resize images during conversion?
items.answer: Yes. Enable the Resize on Convert option and set max width and height.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Yes. All conversions happen locally in your browser. Your images are never uploaded.

items.question: What is the difference between lossy and lossless?
items.answer: Lossy formats (like JPEG) reduce file size by discarding some data. Lossless formats (like PNG) preserve all original data.

examples.title: Try an Example
examples.sampleText: Convert a PNG screenshot to WebP for faster web loading.
examples.result: A high-quality WebP image with significantly smaller file size.
